start.message:
🏡 *Welcome to the Main Menu*

Hello, {{user_name}}!
You can now use this premium bot.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💎 *Premium Dashboard*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
👥 Referrals: {{balance}}/5
🔑 Your Keys: {{keys_count}}
🌐 Total Users: {{total_users}}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

check_join.message:
🚫 *Access Restricted*

🔐 To use this premium bot, you must join all required channels.

📢 *Required Channels:*
• @nxt_coder

After joining, press Check Again.

refer.message:
👥 *Invite & Earn*

Share your personal link and unlock premium files.

🔗 *Your Referral Link:*
{{ref_link}}

🎁 Reward: 5 Referrals = 1 Premium File
👥 Your Referrals: {{balance}}/5

withdraw.message:
🎁 *Withdraw Premium File*

📊 Your Referrals: {{balance}}/5

✅ You need 5 referrals to withdraw one premium file.

Press the button below to submit your withdrawal request.

withdraw_success.message:
✅ *Withdraw Submitted!*

📁 File: Neon Hub WebApp Source Code
🔑 Your Key: {{generated_key}}

👨‍💻 Agent will deliver your file.
Contact agent with your key.

withdraw_locked.message:
🔒 *Withdraw Locked*

You need more referrals.
👥 Your Referrals: {{balance}}/5

Share your link to invite more users!

support.message:
💬 *Premium Support*

Need help? Contact our support agent.

👤 Support: @support_username
🕐 Available: 24/7

rules.message:
📜 *Premium Rules*

1. Only real users are counted.
2. Fake or spam referrals may be removed.
3. One premium file can be claimed per complete referral target.
4. Keep your key safe.
5. Contact support for any delivery issue.

how_it_works.message:
ℹ️ *How It Works*

1️⃣ Join all required channels.
2️⃣ Share your referral link.
3️⃣ Invite real users.
4️⃣ Unlock withdraw (5 referrals).
5️⃣ Get a premium key.
6️⃣ Agent delivers the file.

force_join_panel.message:
📢 *Force Join Manager*

Current channels:
{{force_channels_list}}

Add or remove channels below.

broadcast_panel.message:
📢 *Broadcast Message*

Send a message to all {{total_users}} users.

Type your message below:

broadcast_done.message:
✅ *Broadcast Sent!*

Message delivered to all users successfully.

activity_panel.message:
📡 *Auto Activity Posts*

Channel: {{activity_channel}}
Status: {{activity_status}}

Auto posts:
• New user join
• New referral
• File claim / withdraw
